text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! I appear before you cloaked in
triumph!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Now, revere me without restraint! Lavish me with
praise worthy of a winner!
choice_data_list:
I'd expect nothing less from a first-rate
Umamusume!
There's still a ways to go!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Yes, yes! Excellent! That's the spirit! ♪

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But one round of praise won't do! ♪ Let's do it
again! Ready?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, while you're at it, why not praise me once
more? We've still got plenty of time, right? Come
on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I continue to shower King Halo with praise until
she's satisfied.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Yes, that's right! There's still a ways to go...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
With the way you give praise! What's wrong with
you?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...Very well, then. Why don't you prepare some
races more fitting for yours truly?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You must be convinced that races of this caliber
are beneath me, yes?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
In that case, we can set aside the matter of praise
until you prepare some worthy competition.
Ohohoho!
